genre_refs: New York Post front-page styling; torn-paper collage
description: A social-media graphic in the form of a torn-newsprint collage. The off-white top portion has a ragged torn-paper bottom edge and carries the New York Post masthead (its italic logo) next to a small American flag, a red 'POLITICS' tag and black 'EXCLUSIVE' tag, and a bold black headline: 'ICE rounds up over 1,000 illegal immigrants during two-week operation to honor Laken Riley.' Below the torn edge is a color photo of a smiling young brown-haired woman (Laken Riley) in a strapless black top, outdoors in front of pastel houses and palm trees, her image cut out and composited below the torn headline.
notable_text: NEW YORK POST; POLITICS / EXCLUSIVE; ICE rounds up over 1,000 illegal immigrants during two-week operation to honor Laken Riley
